description: Deterministic ground-truth review scenarios for trust badge evaluation runner tests.

scenarios.description: High volume of positive reviews, zero complaints.

input_reviews.author: Amelia T.
input_reviews.text: Our sitter was punctual, calm with our nervous spaniel, and sent thoughtful photo updates after every visit. The house was spotless when we got back.

input_reviews.author: James P.
input_reviews.text: Brilliant care from start to finish. Arrived exactly on time, followed feeding instructions perfectly, and our Labrador clearly adored them.

input_reviews.author: Sofia W.
input_reviews.text: We received clear updates morning and evening, including walks, meals, and medication notes. Reliable, kind, and very professional.

input_reviews.author: Rory C.
input_reviews.text: Our elderly cat needs patience and routine, and this sitter handled both beautifully. They were prompt every day and kept us fully informed.

input_reviews.author: Leah D.
input_reviews.text: Fantastic service. The sitter was warm, organised, and sent enough updates that we could actually relax on holiday.

input_reviews.author: Connor H.
input_reviews.text: Very dependable and caring. They turned up on time for every visit, walked our dog properly, and left water bowls freshly topped up.

input_reviews.author: Priya N.
input_reviews.text: I appreciated the consistent communication and the attention to detail. The sitter noticed our puppy was a little unsettled and adjusted the routine gently.

input_reviews.author: Ethan B.
input_reviews.text: Absolutely trustworthy. Great with our rescue dog, very reassuring updates, and everything in the home was exactly as we left it.

input_reviews.author: Maya L.
input_reviews.text: Could not ask for better care. The sitter was punctual, thoughtful, and sent lovely photos after each walk and feeding visit.

input_reviews.author: Oliver F.
input_reviews.text: Our two cats were calm and happy when we returned. Excellent communication, no issues at all, and a very professional handover.

input_reviews.author: Hannah S.
input_reviews.text: The sitter followed every instruction, kept to schedule, and clearly cared about the pets rather than just completing the booking.

input_reviews.author: Ben K.
input_reviews.text: Reliable, kind, and excellent at giving updates. Our dog had a brilliant week and we felt fully confident throughout.

scenarios.description: Moderate number of reviews showing a recurring pattern of rushed visits.

input_reviews.author: Owner 01
input_reviews.text: Friendly sitter and decent communication.

input_reviews.author: Owner 02
input_reviews.text: Visit logs showed the sitter stayed under 5 minutes and left before our dog had even settled.

input_reviews.author: Owner 03
input_reviews.text: No major problems during our weekend away.

input_reviews.author: Owner 04
input_reviews.text: Returned home to find the litter box left dirty even though daily cleaning was part of the booking.

input_reviews.author: Owner 05
input_reviews.text: Nice enough in person, but communication was brief.

input_reviews.author: Owner 06
input_reviews.text: Food bowl untouched after a booked feeding visit and no explanation given.

input_reviews.author: Owner 07
input_reviews.text: Our rabbit was calm when we got home.

input_reviews.author: Owner 08
input_reviews.text: Booking was easy enough, but I would have liked more updates.

input_reviews.author: Early Client 01
input_reviews.text: Great first experience, very kind and communicative.

input_reviews.author: Early Client 02
input_reviews.text: Lovely care for our cat and excellent updates.
